title: Onboarding - Check onboarding screens UI
scenario: Verify the UI of onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) when progressing through the first-time app launch flow.
steps: Start the app for the first time and progress through the onboarding flow until reaching the "Organized" screen.
Verify the Organized page UI matches the Figma reference (https://www.figma.com/design/kVruq94TvQDlPCELGmJcs5/Studio-Mobile-Spec?node-id=9176-39256&t=TUmBPGsfUnsn5Xme-0).
Swipe to the next page and verify the Up-to-Date page UI.
Swipe to the next page and verify the Personal page UI.
expected: All onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) display correctly and match the Figma design specifications.
